title: Spicy Crunchy Beef Skewers
description: A comforting Filipino dish featuring feather blade beef, fold in a spicy and crunchy sauce that is kosher-friendly.

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes (Sriracha or Crushed Red Peppers)

instructions: Combine ketchup, soy sauce, lime juice, red pepper flakes, olive oil, garlic powder, and chili powder in a bowl. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Prepare skewers by threading the Feather Blade Beef pieces onto metal or wooden skewers, leaving about 1 inch of space between each piece for air circulation to prevent burning.
Drizzle the prepared sauce mixture on top of the beef slices on the skewers, making sure it is well coated and evenly distributed across all surfaces.
Place the skewers directly in the oven and bake for approximately 20 minutes or until fully cooked through. Rotate the skewers halfway through cooking to ensure even browning.
Allow the Spicy Crunchy Beef Skewers to cool slightly before serving, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
